| `use-hivemind-skill-authoring` | 🟠 CORRUPT | Self-references 5 times in consolidates field |

| 9 other skills | 🟡 MINOR | Missing parent field + incomplete resource tables |

**Dispatching Wave 2:** Cross-skill conflict investigation — terminology alignment, reference integrity, template format consistency. Read-only.
